meta.description: A notification channel configuration (webhook, mcp, or reactive). Referenced by a subscription via channelId.

type.description: Channel type. webhook: HTTP POST to url. mcp: notify an active MCP session. reactive: notify a reactive Studio component.

url.description: webhook: endpoint URL. Use $VAR syntax for secrets — never inline credentials.

secret.description: webhook: HMAC-SHA256 signing secret. Use $VAR syntax. If set, the adapter signs the request body and includes the signature in X-Kanecta-Signature.

sessionId.description: mcp: ID of the active MCP session to deliver notifications to.

componentId.description: reactive: UUID of the Studio component to notify. The component re-renders on delivery.

sqlSchema: -- Built-in type: adapter handles storage natively.
